category_sources: source_facts.description says "Package Management Solution for Python"; official Rye site describes Rye as project and package management for Python.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rye; official documentation site title and heading use Rye capitalization.
docs_sources: Official Rye documentation site provides the user guide and command documentation; official repository README is secondary.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/astral-sh/rye, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Python package management; official Rye site describes managing Python installations, pyproject.toml projects, dependencies, virtualenvs, workspaces, and global tool installs.
